title: Would you get inside an Evangelion if given the chance
display_title: Would you get inside an Evangelion if given the chance
wikitext:
[]: Would you get inside an Evangelion if given the chance?             Quote Post by Dave » Wed Jul 07, 2004 1:49 pm Would you get inside an Evangelion if given the chance? (Don't mind me my mind works in weird ways.) Personally, you wouldn't be able to pay me enough to get inside the entry plug. I mean they shove it into the Eva's spine! And the eva itself is a living breathing person. I love the show and all.. but the Eva's creep me out.

[]:             Quote Post by Asterix » Wed Jul 07, 2004 2:19 pm Personally I think it would be really nifty. Controlling an enormous sudo-robot with the power to go anywhere and smash anything? Really though, I would love to do it. Although having to fight angels that would sooner like to see you fried that moving would sorta suck. :roll: I just think the whole entry plug deal is a really sweet contraption and could be a blast to get to use/sit in/etc.

[]:             Quote Post by max3000 » Wed Jul 07, 2004 2:26 pm I would if it wasn't for the LCL... me and water have bad history...

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Wed Jul 07, 2004 2:29 pm Actually, I think I'd go for it. The chance to be involved in such a great technological advancement would definately appeal to me. That, and I'd love to control it just because I think it would be an interesting experience. Sure, the Angels would kinda want to kill you, but survival of the fittest. I wouldn't mind a good fight.

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Loves Toji » Wed Jul 07, 2004 3:19 pm i would but i dont think it would move, i mean my mom is still alive and all

[]:             Quote Post by max3000 » Wed Jul 07, 2004 3:20 pm Asuka Loves Toji wrote: i would but i dont think it would move, i mean my mom is still alive and all

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Wed Jul 07, 2004 4:36 pm Heck yeah! Sign me up! Screw the LCL, I wanna ride!

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Wed Jul 07, 2004 4:39 pm I would not want to get inside of an Eva. I would like to get "inside" of Misato though. (Herk herk herk)

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Wed Jul 07, 2004 4:40 pm Tut, hentai.... (So would I!!!)

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Wed Jul 07, 2004 4:44 pm EVA-01X wrote: Heck yeah! Sign me up! Screw the LCL, I wanna ride!

[]:             Quote Post by Genocide » Wed Jul 07, 2004 4:44 pm I probably would. I would be scared shitless though of the LCL. I'd think I was drowning and stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by max3000 » Wed Jul 07, 2004 5:35 pm I can't believe you guys didn't figure it out while you were watching Eva so many times. Here's what i mean: Rei, Shinji and Asuka were all messed-up not just because of their past, but the way they control Eva had a major part messing with their minds to depression. You see, you control Eva with you'r thoughts. Eva has a soul and a will. The Eva unconciously digs under the human mind. Which makes you more depressed and emotionaly un-stabilized. Thats the main reason i wouldn't want to go inside the Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Wed Jul 07, 2004 6:01 pm Don't forget that you would feel everything the Eva feels... ouch. I think I would do it though.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Wed Jul 07, 2004 6:03 pm To those who would: your all crazy. Why the hell would get inside another LIVING BEING? Ugh.. so... wrong...

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Wed Jul 07, 2004 6:34 pm Just like My Gendo/Unit-01 Lemon idea....

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Wed Jul 07, 2004 7:13 pm Max3000 > I've never really seen it that way. There's nothing that says "Piloting Eva can cause depression, emotional instability, and paranoia. Use with caution." They use their minds to will the Eva into motion. What they picture, the Eva will do. (ie; walking) The pilot's depression seems too coincidental to me. They all had rough pasts and things that they're still dealing with, so that can definately account for bouts of depression. It's more the interaction and hostility between the pilots and the other characters that makes them more depressed, or I believe anyways. For Asuka, she got all upset about Shinji surpassing her. That made her unable to concentrate on piloting, and that made her sync ratio go down. Her Eva didnt make her sync ratio go down, it was an effect that another person had on her mind. Shinji was already emotionally unstable to begin with, so you can't really say that Eva caused that. It all seems coincidental to me, that's all. I'm more than likely incorrect anyways. Dave > Then call me crazy, I'd still do it. I take it you'd rather let the world end or something?

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Wed Jul 07, 2004 7:15 pm Hey if it was pilot it or watch everyone die than sure. I guess what I meant to ask was "Would you pilot an Eva just to pilot it?".

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Wed Jul 07, 2004 7:36 pm regardless of the side effects id still do it

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Wed Jul 07, 2004 8:02 pm Dave wrote: Hey if it was pilot it or watch everyone die than sure. I guess what I meant to ask was "Would you pilot an Eva just to pilot it?".

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Wed Jul 07, 2004 8:07 pm Hell yea I'd pilot it. How many teenagers get to pilot an uber unstoppable killing machine? Who cannot deny the glee of piloting an Eva?! Having all that power and ownage, taking out angels and military vehicles (EoE). But like a lot have pointed out, theres the whole chance of getting fried by angels or even worser deaths. But hey I'd rather have some fun and go out with a bang then just get squashed underneath an angel's toe.
